era: 2013-present. Punk Pop. E=7 -- darker, confrontational irony. Supergroup. Capitol Hill. Hardly Art (Sub Pop subsidiary). Second consecutive Hardly Art entry.

theory_nodes.concept: Consecutive Hardly Art entries (282: Tacocat, 283: Childbirth). Unprecedented in engine. Capitol Hill indie scene density in 2010s. Same label, same neighborhood, shared bassist (McKenna). Hardly Art as scene infrastructure analogous to Kill Rock Stars in 1990s.
theory_nodes.description: Two consecutive Hardly Art entries at 282-283 document Capitol Hill scene density.

theory_nodes.concept: Supergroup structure: McKenna (Tacocat), Shapiro (Chastity Belt), Peck. Three vocalists -- vocal democracy. Three different band backgrounds produce one darker punk pop approach.
theory_nodes.description: Childbirth supergroup: three bands, three vocalists, one darker register.

theory_nodes.concept: Tacocat(282) vs Childbirth(283): same E=7, same label, same neighborhood, different temperature. Tacocat warm/hook-driven. Childbirth dark/ironic. McKenna's bass in both is the literal bridge between the two temperatures.
theory_nodes.description: Same energy, same label, different temperature: two modes of Capitol Hill feminist punk pop.

cross_references.relationship: Bree McKenna shared. Same label (Hardly Art). E=7 on both. Warm/hook-driven (282) vs. dark/ironic (283). Two modes of the same Capitol Hill feminist punk pop tradition across one degree.
Riot grrrl antecedent. Childbirth's dark irony is a different register from Bikini Kill's confrontation-mode feminism, but both are political and both root in women's bodily experience.
E=7 continues. Garage punk. Self-released. The underground entry after two consecutive Hardly Art degrees. The Capitol Hill punk arc continues.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 + E=8 = E=15. FIRST OTARIIDAE. Steller Sea Lion E=8 is the higher energy -- the massive sustained guttural roar of a rookery bull. Childbirth's confrontational dark feminist punk pop paired with the most imposing marine mammal sound in the arc. The discomfort of both is deliberate and different.
